digest.greeting: Jean, today moved several Tuesday follow-ups forward: TRACE taskset issues were routed, Mar's leave request was reviewed, and the intake workflow path got its alignment checkpoint. The main carry-forward work is much narrower now: finish the KPI SMART goals and update Jorge's project sheet for Jill's portfolio.

items.label: Routed the TRACE taskset issues for IT and BA follow-up
items.detail: The TRACE taskset follow-up is now marked complete after Yuri confirmed the issues had already been sent through the DevOps path.

items.label: Reviewed Mar Garcia's June 26 leave request
items.detail: The leave-review item from today's action list is now complete.

items.label: Checked the Toggl access restriction question
items.detail: The Toggl access follow-up is now marked complete after the team-wide restriction question was checked.

items.label: Reviewed the AOS Rejection downstream task plan
items.detail: The AOS Rejection follow-up is now complete after the downstream task and owner plan was reviewed.

items.label: Prepared the intake workflow decision path
items.detail: The intake workflow prep item is now complete after today's Pending IT Review alignment work.

items.label: Clarified Vendors and TRACE-adjacent ownership routing
items.detail: The ownership-routing follow-up is now complete after today's Vendors and TRACE-adjacent alignment work.

items.label: Turn the KPI set into SMART goals
items.detail: Keep the KPI set close to the EPMO storyline so it becomes a small group of leadership-ready goals rather than a loose metric list.

items.label: Update Jorge's project sheet for Jill's portfolio
items.detail: Carry forward the project-sheet update tied to Jill's portfolio. It pairs well with tomorrow's Jorge transition-plan conversation.

items.label: SLQ 2.0 packaging should be priced around daily sends
items.detail: Jhara clarified on the Baesman packaging thread that the business prefers daily sends rather than a weekly cadence.

items.label: 1:1 David & Jean
items.detail: Use this for CoE, TRACE, or taskset follow-through if Yuri's DevOps and BA note needs escalation.

items.label: 1:1 Carolina and Jean
items.detail: Department support and project-review conversation; good place to identify any new intake or support asks.

items.label: Focus time and blocked space
items.detail: Outlook shows focus time followed by a protected blocked-space window. Keep this available for KPI SMART-goal cleanup, Jorge's project sheet, or follow-through from today's intake workflow meeting.

items.label: Jorge|Jean TM's transition plan
items.detail: Jorge's invite asks for schedules, approved time off, performance feedback, and skills or experience context before team-member transition.

items.label: 1:1 Yuri & Jean
items.detail: Follow-up point for TRACE taskset issues, DevOps ticket status, and any IT or BA dependency from this week's testing.

items.label: 1:1 Andrea and Jean
items.detail: Additional PM checkpoint on tomorrow's calendar after the Yuri 1:1.

items.label: LeadUp Module 2
items.detail: Second LeadUp session focused on moving from diagnosis to team development.

items.label: CoE Biweekly Touchpoint
items.detail: CoE progress and direction touchpoint with David, Frank, and Mar. It overlaps with Jean's weekly meeting-prep focus block.

items.label: Quick Touchpoint with Mar and Jhara
items.detail: New quick touchpoint created today; Mar and Jhara accepted the invite.
